problems_encountered.description: MCP tools not available in agent tool interface despite MCP server being connected. The mittwald MCP server shows as connected via 'claude mcp list', but no mcp__mittwald__* tools are exposed to the AI agent.

tool_response_summary: Tool was not executed - MCP tools not available in agent interface
execution_notes: Environmental issue: MCP server connected but tools not exposed to AI agent session. This may be a Claude Code configuration issue or limitation with how MCP tools are made available to agents.
